summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Crypto Trading Bot app with excellent results. All backend APIs functioning correctly (100% pass rate) and frontend UI working well with successful login, navigation, and dashboard display.

design_issues.issue: Minor DOM element detachment during rapid navigation in automated testing
design_issues.note: Does not affect actual user experience, only automation scripts

passed_tests: Bot control endpoints (POST /api/bot/start, stop, pause, resume)
Trading data endpoints (GET /api/trades, positions, performance, prices)
Frontend dashboard display with KPI cards, bot status, price ticker
Frontend navigation between pages (Dashboard, Trade History)
UI responsive design and color contrast
